messageText: I migrated some static pages to Webflow, rebuilding existing pages and developing new ones from provided designs and integrating Webflow CMS to enable dynamic content management.

Built an AI-powered search page that uses the full website as a knowledge base to deliver accurate, context-aware responses. The AI agent was developed and deployed on Vercel and embedded directly into the Webflow search page.
Visit the live website at https://www.fabric.vc/
The pages are responsive and has many animations and hover effects to make the user experience more engaging and interactive.
I built an AI-powered search page that uses the full website as a knowledge base to deliver accurate, context-aware responses.
The AI agent was developed and deployed on Vercel and embedded directly into the Webflow search page.
